name: Szechuan Chicken with Cashews- (Gai Ding)
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts halves, skinned, deboned and cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix egg white, cornstarch, salt, ginger, soy sauce, and freshly ground pepper.
2. Stir in chicken; cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a wok until hot.
4. Add cashews and stir-fry until light brown, about 1 minute. Drain on paper towels and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon salt.
5. Heat another 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in the wok until hot.
6. Add chicken and stir-fry until it turns white, about 3 minutes. Remove and set aside.
7. In the same wok, add green onions, green pepper, mushrooms, hoisin sauce, and chili paste (or dried red peppers). Stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add chicken back to the wok with the reserved mushroom liquid and cook until boiling.
9. Mix 1 tablespoon cornstarch, cold water, and soy sauce in a small bowl. Stir into the chicken mixture.
10. Cook and stir until thickened, about 1 minute.
11. Stir in cashews and heat through.
12. Remove to serving platter and garnish with reserved onion tops.
